summary: The notebook currently holds two notes: an ML foundations course note on gradient descent and a reading note on the Transformer paper.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: One foundational course note covering gradient descent, learning-rate intuition, and a worked quadratic example.
areas.gap: Only the first note of the ml-foundations course exists; broader topics like linear models or generalization are not yet covered.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: A structured reading of 'Attention Is All You Need' covering self-attention, multi-head attention, and Transformer results.
areas.gap: No notes yet on follow-up topics the reading itself flags, such as sub-quadratic attention, positional encodings, or training-scaling recipes.
